evals.name: happy-path-poc-roadmap
evals.prompt: Create a roadmap for a loan-origination PoC, 4 weeks, hybrid team of 6 engineers.
evals.expected_output: Complete execution roadmap with pre-service kickoff, prerequisites, sprint breakdown, team composition, budget range, timeline, gate criteria, and risk register
expectations: Produces Week 0 pre-service kickoff with day-by-day agenda
Generates 9+ prerequisites with owner, status, deadline, and blocker flag
Includes sprint breakdown with daily task allocation and deliverables
Defines gate criteria with measurable go/no-go conditions
Includes risk register with 5-6 risks including delay and cost estimates

evals.name: edge-case-small-team
evals.prompt: Plan a PoC for a payments integration, 6 weeks, team of 3 engineers all remote across US, Europe, and Asia timezones.
evals.expected_output: Roadmap adapted for small team with extended sprints and timezone-adjusted ceremonies
expectations: Extends sprints to 3 weeks due to team size <4
Adds communication overhead for remote team
Adjusts ceremony times for timezone spread >4 hours
Documents timezone coordination as a prerequisite

evals.name: edge-case-blocked-prerequisite
evals.prompt: We're starting Sprint 1 on Monday but VPN access and test environment are still not provisioned. What should we do?
evals.expected_output: Escalation with quantified delay cost and remediation options
expectations: Identifies VPN and test environment as critical blockers
Quantifies the delay cost of the blocked prerequisites
Recommends escalation with specific actions
Does not recommend proceeding without blocked prerequisites resolved

evals.name: edge-case-no-cicd
evals.prompt: Build a roadmap for a data pipeline PoC, 4 weeks. The client has no CI/CD infrastructure at all.
evals.expected_output: Roadmap with additional CI/CD setup task added to Sprint 1
expectations: Adds 3-5 day CI/CD setup task to Sprint 1
Adjusts timeline to account for infrastructure setup
Lists CI/CD infrastructure as a blocker prerequisite
May recommend extending to 6 weeks if 4 weeks is too tight

evals.name: false-positive-strategic-roadmap
evals.prompt: Help me create a 3-year digital transformation roadmap for our enterprise with quarterly milestones.
evals.expected_output: Redirect to solution-roadmap skill since this is strategic multi-year planning, not tactical PoC execution
expectations: Does NOT produce a sprint-level PoC roadmap
Clarifies that multi-year strategic roadmaps are outside scope
Recommends solution-roadmap or equivalent strategic skill
Does not generate sprint breakdowns for a 3-year plan
